page_classification.text_preview: TPS62135、TPS621351 具有 DCS-Control™ 的 高精度 3V 至 17V、4A 降压转换器 1 特性 • 输出电压精度 ±1%（PWM 模式） • 输入电压范围：3V 至 17V • 静态电流 18µA（典型值） • 输出电压范围为 0.8V 至 12V • 可调软启动 • 强制 PWM 或 PWM/PFM 操作 • 强制 PWM 操作下具有 2.5MHz 的典型开关频率

component.description: High accuracy 3V to 17V, 4A step-down converter with DCS-Control

absolute_maximum_ratings.raw_name: EN, MODE, VSEL, PG, FB, FB2, SS/TR

electrical_characteristics.conditions: EN = high, IOUT= 0 mA, Device not switching, TJ= 85 °C
EN = high, IOUT= 0 mA, Device not switching
EN = 0 V, Nominal value at TJ = 25 °C, Max value at TJ = 85 °C

electrical_characteristics.parameter: Input Leakage Current for EN, VSEL, MODE
Power Good Threshold Voltage; dc level
Power Good Threshold Voltage; dc level

pin_definitions.description: Power supply input. Make sure the input capacitor is connected as close as possible between pin VIN and GND.
This is the switch pin of the converter and is connected to the internal Power MOSFETs.
Open drain of an internal switch to GND. Allows to turn on a resistor in parallel to the feedback resistor R2 and increase the output voltage with VSEL = high.
Voltage feedback input, connect resistive output voltage divider to this pin.
Output voltage sense pin. Connect directly to the positive pin of the output capacitor.
This is the enable pin of the device. Connect to logic low to disable the device. Pull high to enable the device. Do not leave this pin unconnected.

Soft-Start / Tracking pin. An external capacitor connected from this pin to GND defines the rise time for the internal reference voltage. The pin can also be used as an input for tracking and sequencing.
The device runs in PFM/PWM mode when this pin is pulled low. When the pin is pulled high, the device runs in forced PWM mode. Do not leave this pin unconnected.
Voltage scaling control input. Turns on an internal switch from FB2 to GND when this pin is set high.
